DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS: THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL AND NO ATTEMPTS WERE MADE DUE TO THE FACT THAT IT WAS RECEIVED AFTER THE SERVE BY DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CUI, WEI AS TO DEFENDANT PAULSON, DENISE LAVERNE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. THE COURT FINDS THAT THIS CASE IS SPLIT WITH CSM-26-871028. THE COURT DISMISSES THIS CASE SO THE PLAINTIFF CAN GO FORWARD ON THE CORRECT DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF WEI CUI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DENISE LAVERN PAULSON IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
